_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Power_display battery_module dummy with access_panel, keyed connector label, service cover, mass budget note, no live energy system
physics_paths: Load path: Structural loads from handling and display mounting are transferred through the battery_module and access_panel to the mounting datum. Pressure path: No active pressure. Thermal path: Heat from LEDs and electronics is dissipated through the shell and access_panel to the environment. Electrical/data path: Power and data cables routed through harness_passthrough interfaces to the vehicle's power distribution system.

implications: High precision required for bolt_circle_dummy and cable_entry_port to ensure proper fit and alignment.
LEDs and electronics require precise placement and alignment for optimal thermal management and signal integrity.
